message:
Silence WASM-specific clippy warnings

- charmed-wasm: Allow missing_const_for_fn on is_ready() since
  wasm_bindgen doesn't support const fn
- lipgloss/wasm: Allow missing_errors_doc on from_hex() since the
  function currently always succeeds
- lipgloss/wasm: Allow match_same_arms on border_style() since
  explicitly listing all styles is clearer than combining with default

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
